_publications._publicationTitle: A high-throughput kinome screen reveals serum/glucocorticoid-regulated kinase 1 as a therapeutic target for NF2-deficient meningiomas.

_contextSnippet: Cell viability assays were also carried out with the group I PAK inhibitor FRAX597, which was effective in blocking the viability/proliferation of NF2-deficient human MN cells, but at higher concentrations (IC50 > 4 μM) that may not be suitable for treatment
details: Effective in blocking viability/proliferation of NF2-deficient human meningioma cells but at higher concentrations (IC50 > 4 μM)
